phone_presence_notes: Professional and competent but warmth was mostly absent — used the customer's name only once at the open and defaulted to "yes sir" throughout rather than building personal rapport.
top_strength: Outstanding probe — pulled full inventory from returning customer's prior job, confirmed storage-unit details, box count, and pad deposit proactively.
coaching_note: Pricing differentiators largely skipped on rebooking call — always hit damage coverage, Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee even with returning customers.
